name: 单视觉中心布局
description: 画面只有一个绝对的视觉焦点，通常位于中心或视觉重心
description_en: Single absolute visual focus, usually centered or at the visual center of gravity

name: 上图下文
description: 图片位于版面上方，文字位于下方
description_en: Image at the top, text below

name: 左文右图
description: 文字在左侧，图片在右侧
description_en: Text on the left, image on the right

name: 左图右文
description: 图片在左侧，文字在右侧
description_en: Image on the left, text on the right

name: 三段横排
description: 版面被水平分割为上、中、下三个区块
description_en: Layout divided horizontally into top, middle, and bottom sections

name: 四宫格
description: 画面均分为四个矩形模块
description_en: Canvas evenly split into four rectangular modules

name: 九宫格
description: 画面均分为九个模块
description_en: Canvas evenly split into nine modules

name: 标题+内容区
description: 顶部为显著的标题区，下方为大面积内容承载区
description_en: Prominent header area on top, large content area below

name: 主副标题结构
description: 利用字号和粗细对比，形成大标题-副标题-正文的纵向层级
description_en: Type size/weight contrast forms a title-subtitle-body vertical hierarchy

name: 图文卡片阵列
description: 图片与相关文本封装在独立卡片中，重复排列
description_en: Images and related text packaged as cards in a repeated array

name: 满版大图
description: 图片铺满整个版面，无边框，文字叠加其上
description_en: Image fills the entire canvas with no border, text overlays on top

name: 超大标题压图
description: 文字放大到极致，压住主体图片的一部分
description_en: Typography enlarged to the extreme, overlapping part of the main image

name: 视觉破框
description: 主体元素伸出边框或背景区域，打破平面限制
description_en: Main elements extend beyond the frame or background

name: 对角线构图
description: 元素沿对角线排列，或整体倾斜
description_en: Elements aligned along a diagonal or the whole composition is tilted

name: 中央聚焦
description: 所有视觉引导线都指向画面中心的主体
description_en: All visual guide lines point to the central subject

name: 强透视引导
description: 利用近大远小的透视线条指向主体
description_en: Perspective lines converge toward the subject

name: 边缘压迫式构图
description: 主体局部被裁切，紧贴画面边缘
description_en: Subject is partially cropped and pressed to the edges

name: 局部放大
description: 将微小的细节放大至全屏
description_en: A tiny detail is enlarged to fill the whole canvas

name: 画面张力拉伸
description: 通过拉伸、变形或对比，使画面仿佛受到外力拉扯
description_en: Stretching, deformation, or contrast creates a pulled visual tension

name: 时间轴横向
description: 从左至右的线条连接关键节点
description_en: A left-to-right line connects key nodes

name: 时间轴纵向
description: 从上至下的线条，节点分布在左右两侧
description_en: A top-to-bottom line with nodes distributed on both sides

name: 环形流程
description: 首尾相接的闭环结构
description_en: A closed loop structure where start and end connect

name: 步骤阶梯
description: 呈阶梯状上升或下降的排布
description_en: A stair-step arrangement rising or descending

name: 漏斗结构
description: 上宽下窄的倒三角
description_en: An inverted triangle, wide at the top and narrow at the bottom

name: 金字塔结构
description: 下宽上窄的三角形
description_en: A triangle, wide at the bottom and narrow at the top

name: 对比双栏
description: 左右对分，展示两种对立或平行状态
description_en: Split left/right to compare opposing or parallel states

name: Before/After
description: 展示改变前后的效果对比
description_en: Shows the contrast between before and after

name: 路径地图式
description: 像地图一样的非线性或蜿蜒路径
description_en: A nonlinear or winding path like a map

name: 仪表盘布局
description: 多个数据图表在一个版面内组合
description_en: Multiple data charts combined on one canvas

name: 大图讲故事
description: 插画占据主要位置，文字融入场景中
description_en: An illustration dominates; text is integrated into the scene

name: 连环画格子
description: 分格漫画形式，通过格子推进剧情
description_en: Comic panels that advance a story

name: 跳跃式阅读路径
description: 文字排版不拘泥于直线，随图形跳跃分布
description_en: Text layout jumps with shapes rather than following a straight line

name: 图像主导+小文本
description: 巨大的主体形象配以极短的说明文字
description_en: A large main image with very short explanatory text

name: 对话气泡布局
description: 文字包裹在气泡框内，指向角色
description_en: Text wrapped inside speech bubbles pointing to characters

name: 场景展开式
description: 跨页大场景，展现宏大的环境细节
description_en: A panoramic scene that unfolds with rich environmental details

name: 角色引导阅读
description: 固定的小角色出现在页面角落或指引重点
description_en: A small recurring character appears to guide attention

name: 隐藏细节探索式
description: 在复杂的画面中埋藏小元素
description_en: Small elements are hidden within a complex scene

name: 拼图式版面
description: 版面元素像拼图块一样咬合，形状不规则
description_en: Elements interlock like puzzle pieces with irregular shapes

name: 环绕式文字
description: 文字紧贴图形轮廓排布
description_en: Text tightly wraps around the shape outlines

name: 卡片网格
description: 标准化的矩形卡片整齐排列
description_en: Standardized rectangular cards arranged in a neat grid

name: 模块重复
description: 相同的布局结构重复出现，仅内容替换
description_en: The same layout structure repeats with only content changes

name: 乐高式拼接
description: 不同大小的矩形模块严丝合缝地拼在一起
description_en: Different-sized rectangles packed tightly like LEGO blocks

name: 分区仪表板
description: 将屏幕划分为导航、主控、详情等固定功能区
description_en: Screen split into fixed zones such as nav, main, and detail

name: 磁贴式排列
description: 类似Windows Metro UI，色块化的入口
description_en: Metro-like tiles with blocky entrances

name: 信息容器化
description: 所有内容必须装在明显的边框或背景块中
description_en: All content is placed inside visible borders or background blocks

name: Z型阅读动线
description: 视线从左上→右上→左下→右下移动
description_en: Eye movement follows a Z pattern

name: F型扫描结构
description: 视线重点扫描顶部和左侧，呈F形
description_en: Eye scans the top and left, forming an F shape

name: S曲线引导
description: 通过图形引导视线呈S形蜿蜒向下
description_en: Graphics guide the eye in an S-shaped curve

name: 放射状
description: 元素从中心向四周发散
description_en: Elements radiate outward from the center

name: 漩涡聚焦
description: 元素呈螺旋状向中心卷入
description_en: Elements spiral inward toward the center

name: 波浪路径
description: 比S形更平缓的横向或纵向波浪
description_en: A gentler wave path, horizontal or vertical

name: 单向流动
description: 所有元素朝同一个方向运动或指向
description_en: All elements flow or point in a single direction

name: 中轴展开
description: 以中轴线为核心，向两边打开
description_en: Expand from a central axis to both sides

name: 环绕中心
description: 辅助元素围绕中心主体旋转
description_en: Secondary elements orbit around the central subject

name: 多焦点导航
description: 画面有多个重点，通过色彩或连线引导跳跃
description_en: Multiple focal points with jumps guided by color or lines

name: 开场-高潮-结尾
description: 经典的线性叙事结构
description_en: Classic linear narrative structure

name: 滚动故事版
description: 随着页面滚动触发动画和场景变换
description_en: Scrolling triggers animations and scene changes

name: 分镜式结构
description: 模拟电影分镜的格子排列
description_en: Panel layout resembling film storyboards

name: 情绪递进
description: 通过色彩或构图变化表现情绪由淡转浓
description_en: Color or composition shifts show emotions from light to intense

name: 问题-解决
description: 上半部分展示痛点，下半部分展示产品解决
description_en: Top half shows pain points; bottom half shows solutions

name: 英雄旅程结构
description: 环形结构，展示出发、挑战、归来的循环
description_en: Circular structure showing departure, challenge, and return

name: 冲突对比
description: 并置两种截然不同的状态
description_en: Juxtaposition of two contrasting states

name: 多章节画面
description: 像书籍一样分章节展示，有明显的隔断
description_en: Book-like chapters with clear separations

name: 插叙结构
description: 主画面中嵌入过去或未来的小窗口
description_en: Main scene embedded with small windows of past or future

name: 全景展开
description: 超宽画幅展示一个完整的宏大场景
description_en: An ultra-wide panorama of a grand scene

name: 非对称构图
description: 左右极度不平衡，利用视觉重量求得心理平衡
description_en: Extreme left/right imbalance balanced by visual weight

name: 解构版面
description: 将完整的元素拆散、打碎、重组
description_en: Disassemble, break, and recombine elements

name: 随机排布
description: 看似无序的散点分布
description_en: Seemingly random scattered placement

name: 重叠层次
description: 图文相互层叠、遮挡，模糊前后关系
description_en: Text and images overlap, blurring foreground and background

name: 超大边距
description: 内容极度内缩，留下巨大的边框
description_en: Content is heavily inset, leaving huge margins

name: 极密信息
description: 填满所有空白，信息过载
description_en: All space is filled, creating information overload

name: 碎片拼接
description: 不同来源的素材撕裂拼接，或故障效果
description_en: Torn fragments collaged together, sometimes with glitch effects

name: 倾斜网格
description: 整体网格旋转一定角度
description_en: The overall grid is rotated by an angle

name: 打破阅读顺序
description: 文字倒置、竖排混用，迫使读者转头或费力阅读
description_en: Inverted or vertical text mixes to disrupt reading order

name: 多方向阅读
description: 文字朝不同方向排列
description_en: Text arranged in multiple directions

name: 超极简中心
description: 极简背景，中心仅一个Logo或极短单词
description_en: Minimal background with only a logo or short word centered

name: 单元素艺术化
description: 将一个普通物品像雕塑一样打光、展示
description_en: A single ordinary object lit and displayed like sculpture

name: 精准网格系统
description: 严格遵循瑞士国际主义网格，理性、客观
description_en: Strict Swiss grid system, rational and objective

name: 画廊式排版
description: 像挂画一样留有宽大白边，图片独立展示
description_en: Wide white margins like a gallery, images shown independently

name: 时尚杂志风
description: 衬线体大标题，精细的图文叠压，优雅的留白
description_en: Serif headlines, refined overlaps, and elegant whitespace

name: 奢侈品牌感布局
description: 金/黑/白主色，对称或居中，字体古典
description_en: Gold/black/white palette, centered or symmetric, with classic type

name: 高对齐强迫症布局
description: 所有元素边缘切齐，如同刀切一般
description_en: All element edges are perfectly aligned

name: 微妙比例分割
description: 利用黄金分割等数学比例进行非均等分割
description_en: Unequal splits using golden ratio or similar math proportions

name: 规则驱动构图
description: 设计师设定规则，AI随机生成无数变体
description_en: Designer defines rules; AI generates variants

name: 参数化版式
description: 通过调整滑块改变版面的疏密、曲直
description_en: Adjust sliders to change density, curves, and layout

name: 全包围/框式构图
description: 利用前景元素、装饰性边框或负空间将主体围合
description_en: Foreground, decorative borders, or negative space frame the subject

name: 宏微观贯通布局
description: 链式嵌套呈现多尺度结构，利用放大镜或虚线明确连接
description_en: Nested multi-scale structure linked with magnifiers or dotted lines

name: 轴测层级堆栈
description: 采用2.5D轴测视角，将系统架构拆解为垂直分层堆栈
description_en: 2.5D isometric view stacking system layers vertically

name: 数据景观拓扑
description: 将高维数据可视化为3D地形或点云
description_en: High-dimensional data visualized as 3D terrain or point clouds

name: 树状层级结构
description: 从根节点向下或向右分叉成多级分支，以连线表达父子从属关系

name: 泳道流程图
description: 将版面划分为平行泳道代表不同角色或部门，时间轴贯穿并展示协作流程
